channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kevin Warsh Sworn In as Fed Chair
item.description: Kevin Warsh was sworn in Friday as chairman of the Federal Reserve, with President Donald Trump hailing the former Fed governor as a leader who can re...

item.title: House Republicans rip into Senate for delaying immigration reconciliation package: 'I'm very frustrated'
item.description: House Republicans slammed the Senate GOP for kicking the can down the road on voting on a package pertaining to ICE and Border Patrol funding.

item.title: Trump to Skip Don Jr.'s Bahamas Wedding Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump announced Friday that he will remain at the White House this weekend instead of attending the wedding of his eldest son, Donald...

item.title: Fmr Minn. Gov. Candidate to Newsmax: Taxpayers Fed Up With Fraud
item.description: Former Minnesota gubernatorial candidate Kristin Robbins told Newsmax on Friday residents are frustrated with their tax dollars being lost to benefits...
